---
title: "Design Procedure for Pivoting and Rocking Mass Timber Walls with Controlled Overturning Moment"
date: 2023-08-24
categories: [conference, mass-timber]
venue: "2023 PEER Annual Meeting, Berkeley, CA"
description: "Design procedure for pivoting and rocking mass timber walls with controlled overturning moment."
---

## Event

**2023 PEER Annual Meeting**  
Berkeley, CA · August 24, 2023

## Related links

- [Research](/research.qmd)
- [PEER](https://peer.berkeley.edu/)
